---
name: Missing palette piece
about: A buildable exists in-game but isn't in the placement palette
labels: palette
---

**Which piece(s)?** (in-game name and build-menu tab)


**The export** (required — this is literally how the palette grows):
Place the piece(s) in any base, export that base via PalworldSaveTools
(plain `.json`), and attach the file here. One export can carry any number
of new pieces. Each new type gets one in-game verification before it's
marked trusted.
